title: Notes and Queries, Vol. IV, Number 111, December 13, 1851: A Medium of Inter-communication for Literary Men, Artists, Antiquaries, Genealogists, etc.

This volume serves as a forum for the exchange of information and insights among scholars, antiquarians, and literary enthusiasts, providing a glimpse into the intellectual community of its time.   At the start of this volume, the content includes varied notes and queries from contributors, exploring topics such as folk songs, literary criticism, and historical poetry.
